entries.name: title
entries.label: Title
entries.description: The entry's name (rename it in the tree, or here).

entries.name: comment
entries.label: Comment
entries.description: The note / body of this entry — always available, whatever the type.

entries.name: attachment
entries.label: Image / file
entries.description: For an `image` entry: upload an image (or file); it's stored with the entry and can be downloaded or replaced.

entries.name: type
entries.label: Type
entries.description: group = folder; note = text; image = an up/downloadable image (its own attachment); wireframe / sheets / docs / sketchpad = an embedded tool keyed to THIS entry (its own isolated data).

entries.name: parentId
entries.label: Parent
entries.description: The entry this one sits inside. Empty = a root entry.

entries.name: createdBy
entries.label: Created by
entries.description: Who created this entry (defaults to You).

entries.name: prompting
entries.label: Prompting
entries.description: Who this is directed at / asked to respond.
